text:
Okay! What kind?

Once upon a time in a small village nestled between forests and mountains there lived a curious boy named Oliver.

Each dawn he would wake up eagerly anticipating another day exploration. With nothing else to do but explore, Oliver loved nothing more than nature.

One sunny morning Oliver decided he wanted to climb the oldest tree in the village. It stood strong like an ancient oak. Oliver climbed up its thick branches cautious not to tumble down. He leaned far out into space feeling strangely exhilarated.

He reached a branch he couldn an old weathered hat. Then he braced himself—and—

With an impressive wiggle Oliver soared! Whoosh!

When he landed softly on the ground Oliver giggled.

That afternoon Oliver visited the stream.

Then he noticed something peculiar.

One fish was unusually large.

It was an adult owl. You think?

Owl hooted softly.

That night?

There was a full moon.

The moon owl winked at Oliver.

You think?

It winked back
